no: Wilson Chronicles The “Bear Paragon” AKA Bearagon gets more banter.Install Wilson Chronicles before Mazzy Megamod.
sum: Adds extensive party dialogues and encounters for Wilson the bear companion, including NPC banters, new items, and skill enhancements across SoA and ToB.

co.n: Wilson Chronicles - expansion for our favorite bear companion
co.tp2n: Wilson Chronicles - expansion for our favorite bear companion
